headline: Why INDS Self-Storage and Warehouse Blend Offers Steadier Dividends Than Pure Logistics Plays
summary: Pacer Industrial Real Estate ETF (NYSEARCA:INDS) targets income investors seeking exposure to e-commerce warehouses, with a 30-day SEC yield near 3.47% and quarterly distributions stretching back to May 2018. The fund tracks the Solactive GPR Industrial Real Estate Index at an expense ratio of 0.49%. The core question is whether that distribution reflects durable industrial ... headline: Creating Shareholder Value Through a Possible SEGRO and Prologis Combination
summary: Prologis, Inc. ("Prologis") announces that on 16 June 2026 it sent a letter to the Board of SEGRO plc ("SEGRO") setting out the terms of an indicative all-share proposal, pursuant to which Prologis would acquire the entire issued and to be issued share capital of SEGRO (the "Combination").
